title: HELP NEEDED - feedback on my app
excerpt:
HELP NEEDED - feedback on my app 
Hi guys! 
I created an interactive online demo for my app ‘same item multiple boards’. What do you think? 
You can view it here(no installation is required): arcade official | Arcade

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
HELP NEEDED - feedback on my app

Hi guys!

I created an interactive online demo for my app ‘same item multiple boards’. What do you think?

You can view it here(no installation is required): arcade official | Arcade

posts.author: j.hammer (Jason Hammer)
posts.cookedHtml: I like this. Does it currently need to be linked for each item or will all new items created on Board 2 be added to Board 1?

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: You can add an automation like “when item is created, add the same item to board 2”. This will add all of the items automatically to the other board
